ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_upper_wear" INTEGER /* Waist measurement for upper wear in inches */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "waist_bottom_wear" INTEGER /* Waist measurement for bottom wear in inches */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length in inches */,
  "neckline" TEXT /* Neckline type (e.g., crew, v-neck) */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type (e.g., hourglass, rectangular) */,
  "fit_style" TEXT /* Fit style (e.g., slim, relaxed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Brand website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles for the brand */,
  "brand_history" TEXT /* Brief history of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory (e.g., tops -> blouses, dresses -> formal) */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the garment belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the garment belongs to */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style (e.g., Slim Fit Shirt) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the garment */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the garment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the garment */,
  "fabric" TEXT /* Fabric used to make the garment */,
  "color_palette" TEXT /* Color palette used in the garment */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the garment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_sizes" (
  "garment_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment size */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Number of units in stock for the size */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to the size chart for the garment */,
  "fit_description" TEXT /* Description of the fit for the garment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_sizes_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, store manager, admin) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the user in inches */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the user in pounds */,
  "preferred_brands" TEXT /* List of preferred brands for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was recorded */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to take the measurement (e.g., tape measure, 3D scan) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., based on measurements, based on preferences) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the recommendation (e.g., 80%, 90%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., shipped, delivered, returned) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Return status of the item (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Fit rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was created */,
  "fit_issue" TEXT /* Description of the fit issue */,
  "suggested_fix" TEXT /* Suggested fix for the fit issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
